meaning: to have kept count; to know how many; (fig.) to know exactly how thing
sentence: 这件事我心里有数，你放心吧。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì wǒ xīnlǐ yǒushù, nǐ fàngxīn ba.
english: I know exactly how this matter stands — don't worry.

meaning: to set (the tone, a target etc); to lay down (the beat)
sentence: 我们已经定下了明天出发的计划。
pinyin: Wǒmen yǐjīng dìng xià le míngtiān chūfā de jìhuà.
english: We have already set the plan to depart tomorrow.

meaning: to declare oneself emperor; to win the best actor award
sentence: 他在电影节上凭借这部作品称帝。
pinyin: Tā zài diànyǐng jié shàng píngjiè zhè bù zuòpǐn chēngdì.
english: He won the best actor award at the film festival with this work.

meaning: comfort woman (woman or girl forced into sex slavery by the Japanese m
sentence: 慰安妇是日军侵略中遭受深重苦难的受害者。
pinyin: Wèiānfù shì Rìjūn qīnlüè zhōng zāoshòu shēnzhòng kǔnàn de shòuhài zhě.
english: Comfort women were victims who suffered greatly under Japanese military aggression.

meaning: to fill in and submit (a form)
sentence: 请在截止日期前填报志愿表格。
pinyin: Qǐng zài jiézhǐ rìqī qián tiánbào zhìyuàn biǎogé.
english: Please fill in and submit the preference form before the deadline.
